codeReview.summary: Reviewed the rerun fix against the prior blocking failures. All three targeted blockers are resolved: syncTags now deduplicates keywords before article_tags inserts, RichTextEditor no longer relies on dynamic Tailwind min-height class construction, and category PUT order validation now rejects non-integer decimal input with regression coverage.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker procedure remains over-prescriptive for focused fix work: the transcript shows implementation edits before regression-test additions and no agent-browser step, while handoff skillFeedback still reports followedProcedure=true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session 9b8f4ba7-f212-4bad-b505-0f29370e9ae6 shows Edit calls for routes/articles.ts, AdminArticleFormPage.tsx, and routes/categories.ts before test edits, and contains no agent-browser tool usage; .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md requires tests-first and manual verification with agent-browser.

summary: PASS: The rerun fix feature fully resolves the three requested prior blocking issues (duplicate keyword PK collision risk, dynamic Tailwind min-height extraction risk, and decimal order truncation acceptance in category PUT) with corresponding code and regression tests.
